title: Make "Set Board Defaults" to apply to New Boards, not just new columns

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Customizations > Boards > Set Board Defaults does not apply new boards. It only works when you “add” a Status column.

Acceptable Option 1: Make the Set Board Default apply to ALL new boards

Best Option 2: give us the ability to modify the default boards for all types (items, projects, tasks, etc). We wouldn’t have to create “Templates”!!

Also, give us a Board Default setting option for “Priority” as well . . .
